name: Pepper Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Shuck the oysters and reserve their shells and juice.
2. Pour the oyster juice into a hot sauté pan and bring it to a boil.
3. Add the oysters and poach gently for 2 - 3 minutes until their edges curl slightly.
4. In a mortar, grind together peppercorns, garlic, and salt to form a rough paste.
5. Add half a cup of hot oyster juice to the mortar and continue grinding.
6. Remove the oysters from the sauté pan and set aside.
7. Add olive oil and bay leaves to the liquid in the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Blend in the mixture from the mortar, then return the oysters to the pan for a brief heat.
9. Turn off the heat and add lime juice.
10. Serve cold or at room temperature. Refrigerate overnight for best flavor.
